reason: Node 1.3.4 explicitly combines the results of Steps 1 and 2 (nodes 1.3.2 and 1.3.3) but declares NO formal dependencies. It should depend on both 1.3.2 and 1.3.3. Without declared dependencies, automated tools cannot verify that the premises (Steps 1 and 2) have been established before this conclusion is drawn.
